feed.title: Kiran Reddy Bhumireddy

entry.title: Everyone is Chasing Better Models. They’re Missing the Other 90%.

entry.summary: A deep dive into Agentic Engineering and why the architectural infrastructure surrounding LLMs matters more than the models themselves.
